response: The 1876 Battle of the Rosebud, also known as the Battle of Rosebud Creek, featured The Other Magpie, a Crow woman who fought on the side of General George Crook against the Sioux and Cheyenne. She was part of the combined forces of the Crow and Shoshoni allies against the Lakota Sioux and Northern Cheyenne Indians during the Great Sioux War of 1876.
